name: ProjectX
long_description: Infinity is the world's first cloud-native OS built for a multi-agent, GPU-native future. We stream heavy GPU-accelerated applications like robotics simulators, CAD tools, AI workloads directly in browser tabs with dedicated per-app compute and sub-3-second cold starts. No VMs, no local setup. Just a URL.
one_liner: Building Infinity, the cloud OS that runs all apps on any device.
